claim: ChatGPT Agent Builder is a visual workflow canvas; drag blocks, connect with lines, no coding; supports core tools, logic, MCPs

claim: One hour of daily manual work saves ~$18k/year at $50/hr; businesses can build dozen agents for massive leverage
